subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of the Divine Beauty! In every age and cycle, when the Sun of Truth rose above the horizon of sanctity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای جمال الهی در هر عهد و عصر که شمس حقیقت از افق تقدیس طلوع فرمود و
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
